tag_name.description: Tag to create the release from (e.g. 'v1.2.0'). The tag must already exist or target_commitish must be provided.

draft.description: Create as an unpublished draft release

prerelease.description: Mark as a pre-release (alpha, beta, rc, etc.)

target_commitish.description: Branch name or commit SHA to tag from (defaults to the repo's default branch). Required if the tag does not yet exist.

generate_release_notes.description: Auto-generate release notes from commits merged since the previous release
